title: hepetis membranifolia
intro: Hepetis membranifolia, also known as Chinese liver-flush plant or liver-flush plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective effects, which help protect the liver from damage and promote its health. The health benefits of Hepetis membranifolia include reducing liver inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing the body's natural detoxification processes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to support liver health and overall well-being.
